Home Shipping

Shipping

Choose your delivery option below.

Custom 8–12 weeks · Any size & configuration · Team colors, logos, name plates. Packaging & assembly Individual flat-pack boxes · IKEA-style instructions · ~25–30 min assembly per locker.

DELIVERY TIMEFRAMES

CUSTOM ORDER

Explore custom lockers
8–12 weeks | Any size & configuration | Team colors, logos, name plates

Need lockers built to your exact specs? Our custom order option gives you full control: any width and height, custom colors and wood finishes, team logos and graphics, name plates, and interior layouts. Every detail is tailored to your facility and brand. Includes a free design consultation so we can match your timeline and budget. Ideal for new builds, renovations, or programs that want a one-of-a-kind locker room.

Explore options Get custom quote

PACKAGING & ASSEMBLY

SHIPPING INSTRUCTIONS

Our lockers are shipped individually packed in most cases—each unit arrives in its own sturdy, flat-pack box, similar to premium flat-pack furniture. This keeps every locker protected in transit and makes handling and assembly straightforward.

Each box contains all panels, hardware, and a full set of step-by-step instructions in an easy-to-follow, IKEA-style format. Plan for approximately 25–30 minutes to assemble each locker once the box is opened. No special tools are required beyond what we include or you typically have on hand.

Typical box dimensions

Exact package size depends on the locker model and configuration. Below are two representative examples of how our lockers ship flat-packed.

  • Length: 75.59"
  • Width: 23.62"
  • Height: 4.25"
  • Length: 81.87"
  • Width: 27.62"
  • Height: 6.98"

Included with each locker: flat-packed components in one box, full IKEA-style assembly instructions, and hardware. Assembly time: about 25–30 minutes per locker.

Custom wood locker rooms for collegiate and professional programs. Priced right. Built to last. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
